# Monstrolingo - Project Specs (llms.txt)

Document version: 1.0.0
Last updated: 2026-04-06

## 1) Product goal

Monstrolingo is a Svelte web application that helps users view translations for Monster Hunter Wilds game data and simulator build skills.

Main user actions:
- Browse translated category lists with pagination.
- Open entity details by stable key.
- Translate supported build simulator links.
- Change UI language from a language selector.

## 2) Sources of truth

- Backend contract (authoritative): `frontend.llm.md`
- English category naming source: https://mhwilds.kiranico.com/
- UI component system: https://www.shadcn-svelte.com

If this file conflicts with backend JSON contracts, `frontend.llm.md` wins.

## 3) Branding and assets

- Application logo path: `assets/img/logo/montrolingo.png`
- The logo must be displayed in the main layout/header and app metadata where relevant.

## 4) Frontend stack

- Framework: Svelte (web app)
- UI library: shadcn-svelte
- Data format: JSON APIs from backend

Recommended base UI components:
- `Select` for language and category controls
- `Table` for category listings
- `Card`, `Button`, `Input`, `Badge`, `Alert` for details and build translation flow

## 5) Language model for the app

### 5.1 Interface languages (UI locale)

The interface must support these locales:
- `en` (English)
- `fr` (French)
- `ja` (Japanese)
- `de` (German)
- `it` (Italian)
- `es` (Spanish)
- `ko` (Korean)
- `ru` (Russian)

Users must be able to switch interface language from a visible selector in the UI.

### 5.2 Data translation languages (backend-driven)

- Always call `GET /languages` at startup.
- Build source/target translation selectors from API response.
- Use language codes (`en`, `fr`, `ja`, etc.), never UUIDs.
- Do not hardcode backend language options.

## 6) Category scope and API mapping

The app must expose these categories (English labels from Kiranico menu):

| Category label | Category key | Backend path / operation |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Items | `items` | `GET /items/table`, `GET /items/detail/:external_key` |
| Weapon | `weapon` | `GET /weapons/table`, `GET /weapons/detail/:external_key` |
| Armor | `armor` | `GET /armor/table`, `GET /armor/detail/:external_key` |
| Skills | `skills` | `GET /skills/table`, `GET /skills/detail/:external_key` |
| Decorations | `decorations` | `GET /decorations/table`, `GET /decorations/detail/:external_key` |
| Charms | `charms` | `GET /charms/table`, `GET /charms/detail/:external_key` |
| Food Skills | `food_skills` | `GET /food-skills/table`, `GET /food-skills/detail/:external_key` |
| Kinsect | `kinsect` | `GET /kinsects/table`, `GET /kinsects/detail/:external_key` |
| Build translation | `build_translation` | `POST /linkbuild/translate` |

Notes:
- `Build translation` is not a paginated category table.
- Keep `food-skills` hyphenated in API paths.

## 7) Category translation matrix (UI labels)

This matrix defines interface labels for each supported locale.

| Category key | en | fr | ja | de | it | es | ko | ru |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| items | Items | Objets | アイテム | Gegenstände | Oggetti | Objetos | 아이템 | Предметы |
| weapon | Weapon | Arme | 武器 | Waffe | Arma | Arma | 무기 | Оружие |
| armor | Armor | Armure | 防具 | Rüstung | Armatura | Armadura | 방어구 | Броня |
| skills | Skills | Compétences | スキル | Fähigkeiten | Abilità | Habilidades | 스킬 | Навыки |
| decorations | Decorations | Décorations | 装飾品 | Dekorationen | Decorazioni | Decoraciones | 장식주 | Украшения |
| charms | Charms | Talismans | 護石 | Talismane | Amuleti | Amuletos | 호석 | Талисманы |
| food_skills | Food Skills | Talents culinaires | 食事スキル | Essensfähigkeiten | Abilità del cibo | Habilidades de comida | 식사 스킬 | Пищевые навыки |
| kinsect | Kinsect | Kinsecte | 猟虫 | Kinsekt | Kinsetto | Kinsecto | 킨섹트 | Кинсект |
| build_translation | Build translation | Traduction de build | ビルド翻訳 | Build-Übersetzung | Traduzione build | Traducción de build | 빌드 번역 | Перевод билда |

Important:
- These are UI labels only.
- Backend category segments remain canonical (`items`, `weapons`, `armor`, `skills`, `decorations`, `charms`, `food-skills`, `kinsects`).

## 8) Backend integration rules (must follow)

### 8.1 Startup flow
1. Optional `GET /health`
2. Required `GET /languages`
3. Select default source and target languages
4. Load first category table
5. Navigate to details by `external_key`
6. Optional `GET /game/version` for display

### 8.2 Table endpoints

Request:
- `GET /<cat>/table?source_lang=<code>&target_lang=<code>&page=<n>&limit=<n>`

Rules:
- `source_lang` required
- `target_lang` required
- `page` defaults to `1`
- `limit` defaults to `25`, max `100`
- Use `external_key` as stable route key
- `description` may be empty and must not break rendering

### 8.3 Detail endpoints

Request:
- `GET /<cat>/detail/:external_key?target_lang=<code>`

Rules:
- `target_lang` required
- Success payload has `data`
- `translation` may fallback to English when target translation is unavailable

### 8.4 Build translation endpoint

Request:
- `POST /linkbuild/translate`
- Body fields: `url`, `target_lang`

Rules:
- URL must be a supported simulator `/sim/` URL and include `skills=...` in fragment
- `target_lang` must exist in `GET /languages`
- `translation_mode` can be `full` or `partial`
- Render translated skills even when `unmatched_elements` is non-empty
- Common unmatched reasons: `skill_not_found`, `target_translation_missing`

## 9) Error handling contract

Handle API errors by backend `code`, not by free-text `message`.

Known codes:
- `invalid_argument` (HTTP 400)
- `not_found` (HTTP 404)
- `internal` (HTTP 500)

Policy:
- Show user-safe error text
- Retry only where meaningful (typically `internal`, with backoff)

## 10) Non-regression checklist

- Never hardcode backend language options for data translation
- Never send language UUIDs
- Always include `target_lang` on detail requests
- Always include `target_lang` in `POST /linkbuild/translate`
- Never use legacy route `POST /simbuild/translate`
- Never expect `equipment_recomposed` in linkbuild response
- Keep `limit <= 100`
- Use `food-skills` (with hyphen), not `foodskills`

## 11) Minimum page-level feature set

- Header with logo and UI language selector
- Category navigation using translated labels
- Table page per category with pagination and source/target language selectors
- Detail page per `external_key`
- Build translation page for simulator links
- Safe error and partial-translation states
